title: Dungeons Hotbar Lite
description: Remake of Minecraft's HUD to Dungeons style, while maintaining the original layout.
body:
This Resource Pack aims to recreate visual aesthetic of Minecraft Dungeons HUD, while maintaining the original Minecraft layout.

![Hotbar Overview 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a02afaf816e9fe8f4a144e49fec653b25b10ec75.png)

![Hotbar Overview 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e8c8ee1b2e77e7f5a45b6b4bd23a926d7195eee.png)


It's currently unfinished and is still in the works. However, the main and base parts are already done and playable!

# What's done:

- Hotbar
- Hotbar Offhand Slots
- Experience Bar (both background and progress)
- Mount's Jump bar
- Health
  - Base
  - Hardcore
- Air
- Hunger
- Armor

## What's not done:

- Crosshair
- Effect tiles
- Locator Bar
- Health
  - Absorbing
  - Frozen
  - Poisoned
  - Vehicle
  - Withered
  - All hardcore variants for previous types
